assertions.description: INCORRECT: Matrix.sch has 91 MX keyboard switches (K_* refs) and 68 diodes. When analyzed standalone, the key_matrix detector finds switches_on_matrix=0 because the keyboard switches connect to unnamed junction nets rather than directly to ROW/COL-labeled nets (the labels are hierarchical ports on the sheet boundary). The estimated_keys=68 is derived from the diode count, which is less than the actual 91 switches. The correct switch count for this sheet is 91.
